name: ManpowerGroup Inc.
business: ManpowerGroup Inc. is a global leader in innovative workforce solutions. We provide services as Manpower, Experis and Talent Solutions through both branch and franchise offices. Our client mix consists of both small- and medium-size businesses, and large national and multinational clients.

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio of recruitment services includes permanent, temporary and contract recruitment of professionals, as well as administrative, industrial and IT professional positions.

Experis is a global leader in information technology (IT) professional resourcing and project services specializing in Enterprise Applications, Business Transformation, Cloud and Infrastructure, Digital Workspace and Cyber Security.

Experis is a global leader in information technology (IT) professional resourcing and project services specializing in Enterprise Applications, Business Transformation, Cloud and Infrastructure, Digital Workspace and Cyber Security.

Through our industry-leading and AI-enabled assessments, we help people and organizations understand their strengths and potential, resulting in better job matches, higher retention and a stronger workforce.
These include the impact of digitization and generative AI, the green transition and shift in in-demand skills, exacerbating talent shortages, and the increased need for reskilling and upskilling.
Risks and uncertainties related to the development and use of AI could harm our business operations, reduce demand for our services, and raise legal or regulatory challenges.

We could incur liabilities or suffer reputational damage from a cyberattack or improper disclosure or loss of personal or confidential data, and our use of data is subject to complex and ever-changing privacy and cybersecurity legal requirements that could negatively impact our business or subject us to claims and/or fines for non-compliance.

catalysts.event: Accelerated Leadership Program cohort begins in 2026
catalysts.sentence: 25 employees will begin this program in 2026

catalysts.event: Strategic Leadership Program next cohort begins in 2027
catalysts.sentence: the next cohort will begin in 2027
